description_long: This is a light gray athletic sneaker featuring a mesh-textured upper with a subtle hexagonal pattern, providing breathability and flexibility. The shoe has a prominent white Nike Swoosh logo on both lateral and medial sides, and a white lace-up closure with standard criss-cross lacing. The midsole is white with visible air cushioning in the heel, and the outsole has a segmented design for traction and flexibility. The heel includes a pull tab for easy wearing, and the collar is padded for comfort. The overall appearance suggests a modern, sporty design suitable for running or casual urban wear.
description: A light gray Nike athletic sneaker with mesh texture, white Swoosh logos, and a cushioned sole, designed for comfort and urban activity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, mesh upper, and criss-cross lacing with a visible tongue label.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large white Nike Swoosh, mesh texture, and air-cushioned heel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded collar, heel pull tab, and layered heel construction.
description_view_3: Right side view with another white Nike Swoosh and clear view of the textured mesh upper and segmented sole.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides of the shoe, small rectangular label on the tongue
